memoryText: Phoebe (6) found a plain old notebook in a drawer and decided it was magic: whatever she drew inside came true the next day. She drew sunshine and the rain stopped. She drew pancakes and Papa made a mountain of them. When she drew a dragon, the neighbor's cat showed up wearing a very suspicious grumpy face. On the last page she drew her whole family holding hands, forever.

people.name: Phoebe
people.appearance: a 6-year-old girl with blonde hair in a high ponytail, bright blue eyes, wearing pink dungarees over a white shirt with a flower pocket

greeting: For Phoebe — whose drawings make the world more magical.
